transparency_notes: The exact encoded query is shown before opening the external site.
launchers.pii_phi_policy: Do not include PHI or patient-specific facts in external literature searches.

transparency_notes: The launcher creates a transparent browser URL and performs no backend fetch.
launchers.pii_phi_policy: Use condition or intervention terms only; do not include patient identifiers.

transparency_notes: Use the generated URL as a user-visible launch link, not a silent backend call.
launchers.pii_phi_policy: Do not include PHI in regulatory source queries.

transparency_notes: Terminology results remain candidates until reviewed.
launchers.pii_phi_policy: Terminology searches should use standardizable terms only.

transparency_notes: Remote UCUM validation should be cached with source/version metadata when automated later.
launchers.pii_phi_policy: Unit queries must not include patient facts.

transparency_notes: Medication terminology results require review before OMOP drug concept use.
launchers.pii_phi_policy: Use medication names only; do not include patient context.

transparency_notes: FHIR docs are used as implementation evidence, not proof of full conformance.
launchers.pii_phi_policy: FHIR documentation queries should describe standards, not patient data.

warnings: Launchers build transparent URLs only; they do not fetch or ingest external content.
External content becomes searchable only after ingestion approval.
